label: Framställning av drycker
description: Branschspecifik scaffold för producenter av drycker som vill visa sortiment, råvaror och tillverkning samt ta emot förfrågningar från återförsäljare, restauranger eller privatkunder.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende kring råvaror och produktion
göra det enkelt att ta kontakt för offert eller återförsäljarfrågor

routes.purpose: Presentera varumärket, dryckesutbudet och hantverket med en tydlig väg vidare till sortiment eller kontakt.
Visa det konkreta sortimentet med produktnamn, typ, smakprofil, volym och annan relevant information för köp- eller offertintresse.
Bygg förtroende genom att beskriva råvaror, framställning, ursprung och arbetssätt på ett konkret sätt.
Fånga upp besökare som vill begära offert, ställa frågor om sortiment, boka visning eller hitta kontaktuppgifter.

routes.when: när verksamheten har starka miljö-, produkt- eller processbilder som hjälper till att sälja in varumärket
när producenten vill rikta sig särskilt till restauranger, butiker eller distributörer med B2B-information
när verksamheten tar emot besök, provningar eller studiebesök på plats

sectionOrderRules: Hero must include the brand name, what kinds of beverages are produced and a primary CTA to /produkter or /kontakt.
Featured-products must show real beverages or product lines, not generic placeholder cards.
Value-props must be tied to actual strengths such as ingredients, process, origin or flavor profile - avoid generic filler claims.
Production-highlights should briefly explain how the drinks are made and what makes the process relevant to the customer.
Products intro must explain the range clearly, for example beverage categories, seasonality or intended use.
Product-grid items must be concrete and include real names plus useful attributes such as type, flavor notes, volume or packaging.
Do not imply direct online purchase unless the business actually sells online; use inquiry-oriented CTA when needed.
Pricing-or-packaging is optional and should only show information the business can stand behind, such as available bottle sizes or case formats.
About-story must describe the producer's real background, focus or philosophy without invented heritage claims.
Ingredients-and-origin should mention actual raw materials or sourcing principles when known.
Production-process must stay understandable for customers and avoid technical padding that says little.
Quality-and-care may mention real routines such as hygiene, traceability or allergen handling, but must not invent certifications.
Contact-info must include real ways to get in touch such as phone, email and business address when available.
Contact-form-cta should fit the business model, for example offertförfrågan, återförsäljarfråga or allmän kontakt.
Location-or-delivery-info should clarify whether visitors can visit, pick up, or only order via delivery or distributor.
Map is only appropriate when there is a public-facing physical location.

mustPass: Route set matches beverage manufacturing needs with a strong product page and production/story page.
All default routes have matching sectionsPerRoute entries.
CTAs work for inquiry, ordering interest or reseller contact without assuming unsupported ecommerce flow.
Copy framework supports trust through ingredients, process and origin rather than generic restaurant language.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not structure the site like a restaurant menu or catering site unless the business actually serves prepared food.
Do not require booking flows unless visits or tastings are truly offered.
Do not invent webshop checkout behavior if only inquiries or retailer contact are supported.
Do not use vague luxury language without product facts.
Do not claim certifications, awards or distribution scale unless explicitly provided.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Scaffold for beverage manufacturers and drink producers. Includes homepage, products, production/about and contact. Emphasizes beverage range, flavor or product details, ingredients, origin, production process, quality routines, reseller or quote inquiries, gallery and optional visits or tastings.
llmClassificationHints: Choose this scaffold when the business primarily manufactures beverages rather than mainly serving food on site.
Prefer this scaffold when products, ingredients and production method are central trust drivers.
Use inquiry-led CTAs if ecommerce capability is uncertain, even if products are prominently displayed.
Optional reseller and tasting routes are relevant only when clearly supported by the business model.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
